dict.string: Adaptive Surface uses the microphone for voice input on the work surface.
Adaptive Surface uses speech recognition to turn your voice into adaptive local work surfaces.
Adaptive Surface uses AppleScript only as an optional fallback when an Apple app is already running.
Adaptive Surface reads and creates calendar events inside the workspace without opening Calendar.
Adaptive Surface reads and manages reminders inside the workspace without opening Reminders.
Adaptive Surface searches contact names, emails, phone numbers, and organizations without opening Contacts.
